mapper.select:
SELECT A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_STAT , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeReadStat}, A.REPORT_STAT) AS REPORT_STAT_NAME , A.REPORT_STDT , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_COLR , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeBookColr}, A.REPORT_COLR) AS REPORT_COLR_NAME , A.PUBC_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeCommYsno}, A.PUBC_YSNO, #{optPubcYsno}) AS PUBC_YSNO_NAME , A.REPORT_CNTN , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_CVIM , CASE WHEN A.REPORT_STAT = #{reportStatRead} THEN #{commYes} ELSE #{commNo} END AS READING_YN FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb}
AND ( LOWER(B.BOOK_TITL) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{bookKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(B.BOOK_ATHR) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{bookKeyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY A.REPORT_STDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(A.REPORT_GRDE) DESC, A.REPORT_ENDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC
ORDER BY A.REPORT_ENDT DESC, A.REPORT_NUMB DESC

SELECT A.REPORT_NUMB , A.USER_NUMB , A.BOOK_NUMB , A.REPORT_STAT , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeReadStat}, A.REPORT_STAT) AS REPORT_STAT_NAME , A.REPORT_STDT , A.REPORT_ENDT , A.REPORT_GRDE , A.REPORT_COLR , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeBookColr}, A.REPORT_COLR) AS REPORT_COLR_NAME , A.PUBC_YSNO , FN_GET_CODE_NAME(#{codeCommYsno}, A.PUBC_YSNO, #{optPubcYsno}) AS PUBC_YSNO_NAME , A.REPORT_CNTN , NVL(LC.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_CNT , NVL(UL.LIKE_YSNO, #{commNo}) AS LIKE_YSNO , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_ATHR , B.BOOK_CVIM FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A LEFT JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM TB_RPLIKE L GROUP BY L.REPORT_NUMB ) LC ON A.REPORT_NUMB = LC.REPORT_NUMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT L.REPORT_NUMB , #{commYes} AS LIKE_YSNO FROM TB_RPLIKE L WHERE L.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} ) UL ON A.REPORT_NUMB = UL.REPORT_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb}

SELECT B.BOOK_NUMB , B.BOOK_TITL , B.BOOK_ATHR , B.BOOK_CVIM , B.BOOK_ISBN , B.BOOK_PUBL , B.BOOK_DESC , ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(P.REPORT_GRDE)), 1) FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT P WHERE P.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB ) AS BOOK_AVG_GRDE FROM TM_BOOK_REPORT A INNER JOIN TM_BOOK_INFO B ON A.BOOK_NUMB = B.BOOK_NUMB WHERE A.USER_NUMB = #{userNumb} AND A.REPORT_NUMB = #{reportNumb}
SELECT ROUND(AVG(TO_NUMBER(P.REPORT_GRDE)), 1) FROM TM_BOOK_INFO B INNER JOIN TM_BOOK_REPORT P ON B.BOOK_NUMB = P.BOOK_NUMB WHERE B.BOOK_ISBN = #{bookIsbn}
